name: DriverReady AI - DOT Medical Exam Preparation
concept: AI-powered DOT medical exam preparation for CDL drivers. Identifies potential disqualifying conditions before medical exams, generates required documentation for waivers, and matches drivers with sympathetic medical examiners.
target_market: CDL drivers with ongoing medical compliance needs (2M drivers)

market_size.serviceable_addressable_market: 2M drivers with ongoing medical compliance needs

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Driver income loss $1,000-2,500/week, retraining costs $3K-8K if license revoked

ai_advantage: Condition screening: AI analyzes driver health data against DOT disqualifying conditions list
Medication checker: LLM checks all medications against FMCSA guidelines
Waiver documentation: Generates exemption/Sleep Apnea exemption documentation
AME finder: NLP-based matching to medical examiners experienced with specific conditions
competitive_advantage: DOT medical form database (long form complexity)
Condition-specific approval rate data by AME
primary_risks: One-time purchase pattern (per exam, not recurring)
